software.title: Home Assistant OpenSprinkler Custom Integration
software.description: A custom Home Assistant integration for controlling and monitoring OpenSprinkler irrigation controllers.

software.title: py-opensprinkler
software.description: A Python library providing a client for the OpenSprinkler API, used to support the Home Assistant integration.

software.title: Dimensions NFC Server
software.description: LEGO Dimensions Toypad Interface & Server that allows configuration of webhook calls when NFC tags are placed or removed on the toypad.

games.title: Starbase Ships by EGOTech
games.description: EGOTech thrives to design various types of Starbase (game by Frozenbyte) ships that are practical but fun to use. Free blueprints are available for download with premium versions available for sale for in game credits.
